name: Hat of Wizardry
description:
This antiquated, cone—shaped hat is adorned with gold crescent moons and stars. While you are wearing it, you gain the following benefits:
{"type": "list", "items": ["You can use the hat as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells.", "You can try to cast a cantrip that you don't know. The cantrip must be on the wizard spell list, and you must make a {@dc 10} Intelligence ({@skill Arcana}) check. If the check succeeds, you cast the spell.
